title: Smooth Hotbar
description: This resourcepack removes the borders of the hotbar.
body:
### Smooth Hotbar
Never thought the hotbar would look better without the borders?
![Looks cool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a54b61b16c4a926908cdaf2c92eaa862432df34.png)
As you can see, I made it smooth and modern.!

[![support me](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ad8400c327d6c2e83243f45f8a5c51e8625de9e.png)](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/frogpepe60x)
